rules.specExclusivity: Only one spec tree (Sanguine/Accursed/Eternal/Fleshweaver-equivalent) can be active at a time in-game. You commit to ONE non-Class tree and spend your full Talent Essence budget within it (plus the separate Class tree spent with Ability Essence). Treat trees other than 'Class' as mutually exclusive choices, not a blend.
rules.partialRanksCount: A node only needs 1 point invested (not maxPoints) to count as 'connected' for prerequisite checks and to contribute toward the reqTreeAbilityEssence/reqTreeTalentEssence row-unlock thresholds.
rules.budgetCurrencies: Ability Essence (AE) is spent only in the Class tree. Talent Essence (TE) is spent only in whichever single spec tree you commit to. A node's abilityEssenceCost/talentEssenceCost fields show which currency it draws from (never both).
rules.rowGating: reqTreeAbilityEssence / reqTreeTalentEssence on a node is the minimum essence already spent within that SAME tree required to unlock it - not total across trees.
rules.levelGates: Some nodes (mostly entryType Ability) cost 0 essence and unlock automatically at requiredLevel instead of being a budget choice.
rules.prerequisiteFieldsCorrected: 'prerequisites' is the OR-logic grid-connection requirement (matches tooltip 'requires one connected node: A or B or C') - need at least 1 point in ANY ONE listed node. 'specialRequirement' is a separate, rare, AND-logic hard requirement used only by a handful of free/level-gated bonus nodes - ALL listed nodes must already have a point.
rules.budgetTotalsAssumed: Verified live for Bloodmage: 26 Ability Essence (Class tree) / 25 Talent Essence (spec tree) as the spendable caps. Assumed identical for all classes since this is tied to character leveling, not class design - not independently verified per class. Override in the toolkit if a specific class differs.
rules.referencedTerms: Extracted from colored in-line spans in the raw tooltip HTML (e.g. a description that highlights 'Cursed Blood' or 'Bloodbolt'). These are explicit developer-authored callouts to another spell/buff/mechanic name, and are the strongest available signal for detecting mechanical synergy between talents - stronger than plain keyword text matching.

rankDescriptions.description: Each strike from Hurricane is now guaranteed to apply Weapon Engraving: Water or Weapon Engraving: Ice to your target while they are active.

talents.name: Residual Power
talents.description: Increases the damage replicated by Weapon Engraving: Air by 15%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the damage replicated by Weapon Engraving: Air by 15%.

talents.name: Phaser
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Phase Out by -30 sec and removes its mana cost.

rankDescriptions.description: Reduces the cooldown of Phase Out by -30 sec and removes its mana cost.

talents.name: Rift Clones
talents.description:
Casting Phase Out now summons 10 clones of yourself that run in a random direction for 5 seconds.

Rift Clones periodically explode dealing 1 + 19.5% AP Arcane damage to all enemies within 5 yds of them.

rankDescriptions.description:
Casting Phase Out now summons 10 clones of yourself that run in a random direction for 5 seconds.

Rift Clones periodically explode dealing 1 + 19.5% AP Arcane damage to all enemies within 5 yds of them.

talents.name: Frost Spectre
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 25%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 25%.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 50%.

talents.name: Leyfrost
talents.description: Critical strikes with Hoarfrost now cause your next spell within 15 seconds to cast as if the target were Frozen.

rankDescriptions.description: Critical strikes with Hoarfrost now cause your next spell within 15 seconds to cast as if the target were Frozen.

talents.name: Windsage
talents.description:
Level 30 Passive
Smolder now envelops you in wind, causing your next 3 Runeblades to strike an additional time equal to 30% of the damage dealt as Nature damage.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 30 Passive
Smolder now envelops you in wind, causing your next 3 Runeblades to strike an additional time equal to 30% of the damage dealt as Nature damage.

talents.name: Echo Rune
talents.description:
Mark your current location with an echo rune for 20 seconds.

At the end of the duration or upon reactivation, warp back to the marked location and heal for 880 + 150% AP health.

rankDescriptions.description:
Mark your current location with an echo rune for 20 seconds.

At the end of the duration or upon reactivation, warp back to the marked location and heal for 880 + 150% AP health.

talents.name: Primordial Fury
talents.description:
Your runic tattoos flare up for 15 seconds, causing Runeblade to strike up to 5 additional enemies.

For the duration, your Runic Tattoos have 100% increased effectiveness.

rankDescriptions.description:
Your runic tattoos flare up for 15 seconds, causing Runeblade to strike up to 5 additional enemies.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases the critical damage of Smolder, Hurricane, and Hoarfrost by 15%.

rankDescriptions.description: Removes the cast time from Ley Lock, but reduces its duration by 0.5 sec.

rankDescriptions.description: While Weapon Engraving: Air is active, the damage of each strike of your Hurricane is increased by 30%.

talents.name: Magebreaker
talents.description: Dealing damage with Hurricane now also reduces the targets Magic damage dealt by -15% for 8 seconds and dispels 1 harmful magic effect from you with each strike.

rankDescriptions.description: Dealing damage with Hurricane now also reduces the targets Magic damage dealt by -15% for 8 seconds and dispels 1 harmful magic effect from you with each strike.

talents.description: Increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 10%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 10%.

talents.name: Primordial Echoes
talents.description: Your critical strikes dealt with Primordial Blast now have a 40% chance to strike an additional time.

rankDescriptions.description: Your critical strikes dealt with Primordial Blast now have a 40% chance to strike an additional time.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 40 Passive

talents.name: Swift Etching

rankDescriptions.description: After Hurricane ends, your melee attack speed is increased by 15% and critical strike chance by 10% for 10 seconds.

talents.name: Runic Power
talents.description:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, critical strikes now increase the chance for the target to be critically struck by your spells by 3% for 10 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, critical strikes now increase the chance for the target to be critically struck by your spells by 3% for 10 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ice Rune by -20 sec and increases the mana cost by 50%, but reduces its range by -10 yds.

talents.name: Fracture

Strike an enemy with frozen fury, dealing 1021 + 100% AP Frost damage and Burning 25 + 35% AP of the target's mana.

Damage dealt is guaranteed to critically strike against frozen targets.

rankDescriptions.description:

talents.name: Spellfire Runes

rankDescriptions.description: Your Runeblade now has a 20% chance, and Warpdagger a 100% chance, to reset the cooldown of Smolder, and increase the damage of your next Smolder by 20%.

talents.name: Surging Slash
talents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now transforms your next Runeblade within 15 seconds into Surging Slash.
Surging Slash (Transform)Strike an enemy with a rune-infused weapon, dealing 110% Weapon Damage plus 60 Elemental Damage, bouncing to up to 4 additional enemies, dealing less damage with each bounce.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 50 Passive
Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now transforms your next Runeblade within 15 seconds into Surging Slash.

rankDescriptions.description: After Hurricane ends, you may now use abilties that require Runeshroud for 5 seconds.

talents.name: Genesis
talents.description:
Apply a runic brand to an enemy for 8 seconds, accumulating 50% of your damage dealt, and unleashing after 8 seconds as Elemental Damage.

When this deals damage, it triggers your Weapon Engraving.

rankDescriptions.description:

talents.name: Turbulence
talents.description:
Send out a gust of wind from your weapon that strikes nearby enemies in a 6 yd radius for 200% Weapon Damage as Nature damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

While active, you leave behind a Turbulent Spiral every 1 sec for 6 seconds.
Turbulent Spiral (Damage)Enemies in the area take an additional 97 + 13.5% AP Nature Damage every 1 sec.

rankDescriptions.description:
Send out a gust of wind from your weapon that strikes nearby enemies in a 6 yd radius for 200% Weapon Damage as Nature damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

While active, you leave behind a Turbulent Spiral every 1 sec for 6 seconds.
Turbulent Spiral (Damage)Enemies in the area take an additional 97 + 13.5% AP Nature Damage every 1 sec.

talents.name: Runic Brand
talents.description: Brand an enemy, dealing 10 + 26% AP Fire damage with each weapon, and marking the enemy for 8 seconds.Marked: Runic BrandYour next Runeblade on the enemy causes a Runic Explosion, dealing an additional 121 + 18.5% AP Spellfire Damage to nearby enemies.
